summary: Frontend testing of two bug fixes on /celebrate-soul Celebration Wall: (1) Lightbox close button visibility/usability and (2) Uploaded photo appearing immediately on wall. Both fixes verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test UGC photos during verification (automatically submitted via /api/celebration-wall/photos/ugc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both critical bugs on /celebrate-soul Celebration Wall have been verified fixed. (1) Lightbox close button: position:fixed, zIndex:9999, white background, visible and clickable - verified by checking computed style and actual click. (2) Optimistic UI update: photo appears at position 2 immediately after 'See your photo' click - verified by counting wall-card elements (8 → 9). The WallCard uses data-testid='wall-card-{photo.id}' (not 'wall-card'), so use data-testid^='wall-card-' for future tests.

1_page_loads_with_wall.evidence: celebrate-soul page loaded, data-testid='celebration-wall' visible. Pet 'Mojo' shown in subtitle 'Where Mojo's community celebrates. Add yours to the wall.'

2_photo_card_opens_lightbox.evidence: Clicking first photo card (Euro) opened lightbox with data-testid='wall-lightbox-overlay' visible

3_lightbox_close_button_visible.evidence: Close button data-testid='lightbox-close' has computed style: position=fixed, zIndex=9999, background=rgb(255,255,255), visibility=visible, opacity=1. Located at top:20px, right:20px. Bounding box: {x:1376, y:20, width:44, height:44}

4_lightbox_close_button_clickable.evidence: After clicking close button, lightbox data-testid='wall-lightbox-overlay' is no longer visible

5_share_your_story_modal.evidence: Clicking 'Share Your Story' button opens 3-step upload modal. Modal data-testid='wall-upload-modal' appears with '📸 Add Mojo's moment' header

6_upload_3_step_flow.evidence: Step 1 (file upload) → Step 2 (caption+type+city) → Step 3 (confirmation 'Your story is on the wall ♥') all working. Step 3 confirmation shows 'See your photo →' button

7_photo_appears_immediately.evidence: After clicking 'See your photo', wall cards increased from 8 to 9. New card at position 2 shows 'Pending review' badge, Mojo name, caption, Mira comment, and city. Wall subtitle changed to 'Your story is on the wall ♥' and share btn changed to '✓ Your story is on the wall'

8_lightbox_on_uploaded_photo.evidence: Clicking newly uploaded photo at position 2 opens lightbox. Close button visible and clickable, lightbox closes correctly.

bug1_lightbox_close_button.fix_applied: WallLightbox.jsx: position:fixed, top:20px, right:20px, background:#FFFFFF, zIndex:9999
bug1_lightbox_close_button.verified: PASS - button is a white circle at top-right, clearly visible, clickable

bug2_photo_instant_appearance.description: Uploaded photo did not appear instantly on the wall
bug2_photo_instant_appearance.fix_applied: CelebrationMemoryWall.jsx: submittedPhoto state added, handleSubmitted creates local photo object and sets it immediately after 'See your photo' is clicked
bug2_photo_instant_appearance.verified: PASS - photo appears at position 2 immediately (8 → 9 cards)

bug3_prop_mismatch.description: petName was passed but component expects pet
bug3_prop_mismatch.fix_applied: CelebratePageNew.jsx: now passes pet={selectedPet} to CelebrationMemoryWall
bug3_prop_mismatch.verified: PASS - wall subtitle shows Mojo's name correctly
